calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Elizabeth Adler (Administrator). Michael Lubofsky for Edith Brown, Stan Potter, William Potter and Elizabeth Warshaw (Beneficiaries).

Mr. Lubofsky objected to the fee being requested for the services provided by Virginia Palmer and the exrtaordinary fees stating that he disagrees with the characterization. Mr. Mangini expressed that he was pleased with Ms. Palmer's analysis and that the additional accounting was required for the distribution requested by Mr. Lubofsky's clients. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Continued To Nov-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Brian Connors appearing for Estate Research Associates. Michael Lubofsky appearing for Willian Potter and Elizabeth Warsaw. Discovery is completed. Oral arguments presented by both counsel. Court has not seen Mr. Lubofsky's response. A copy of the response is provided by Mr. Lubofsky. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Mangini appearing for administrator w/wa Elizabeth Adler. Michael Lubofsky appearing for beneficiaries. Mr. Lubofsky objected to the statutory fees and extraordinary fees. Oral arguments presented by both counsel. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Continued To Jul-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brian Connors appearing for Estate Research Associates. John Managini appearing for administrator Elizabeth Adler. Michael Lubofsky appearing for four beneficiaries. The administrator's second account is continued to 7/3. Mr. Connors has sent out discovery request. He wanted to set up a briefing schedule. Mr. Lubofsky objected to having to answer discovery. Only two of his clients are objecting to the petition at this time. He is requesting for distribution to the two other beneficiaries. He is willing to admit except one interrogatory. Court accepted Mr. Lubofsky's stipulation on the record and he will have until 6/19 to answer the interrogatory. Mr. Connors will file a brief on or before 6/27. Any response on or before 7/3. Matter is continued to 7/10.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Continued To Jul-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: John Mangini appearing for administrator Elizabeth Adler. Brian Connors appearing for Estate Research Associates. Michael Lubofsky for beneficiaries. Court stated that the trust did not existed. Distribution will be to the beneficiaries from probate. No objection to this petition.
Mr. Connors stated that there is no agreement on the petition to determine entitlement to distribution. He is requesting for an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Lubofsky argued that it is not an assignment but it is a contract. Distibution should be made to the four beneficiaries and they can deal with Estate Research Associates.
Court wants counsel to meet and confer outside of court.
At 10:26am, all counsel returned to court. They were unable to talk to Ms. Pantazis. Mr. Connors wants to have an evidentiary hearing. He wants to take depositions. Mr. Lubofsky wants to have Edith Brown's share distibuted to her. Mr. Connors have no objection to that distribution. Mr. Mangini will file the final account and petition for partial distribution in the next week or two. Matter is continued to 6/12.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Final Distribution And Accounting. No Appearence If Filed.
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: John Managini appearing for administrator Elizabeth Adler. Brian Connors appearing for interested party Estate Research Associates. Michael Lubofsky appearing for beneficiaries. Mr. Lubofsky wants to have distributions to the beneficiaries not to the trustee. There is some disagreement on the fee agreement between the heir finder and the beneficiaries. Court wants to have the distribution to the trustee to be distributed from the trust to the beneficiaries. Mr. Managini will file the final account and petition for final distribution. Mr. Connors will file a petition on the fee agreement. This status is off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Final Distribution And Accounting. No Appearence If Filed.
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3794 & 3796 16th St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini (Counsel for Elizabeth Adler, Personal Representative).

After announcing the sale of the property and the first overbid, sale of the property was confirmed on overbid in the amount of $1,204,000.00 with additional bond required in the amount of $1,050,000. The Order for same was signed in open court subsequent to the hearing upon presentation of the required bond and form for increased bid in open court.
